CustomField.formula: IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Quote", IMAGE( CASE( StageName, "Policy - Live", "/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Quote Provided", "/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Quote Referred", "/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif", "Quote Declined", "/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Closed Lost", "/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "/s.gif"), "Stage Flag"), IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Policy", IMAGE( CASE( StageName, "Policy - Live", "/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Policy - Cancelled", "/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Closed Lost", "/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "/s.gif"), "Stage Flag"), IMAGE( CASE( StageName, "Quote Provided", "/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Quote Required", "/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif", "/s.gif"), "Stage Flag") ))
CustomField.label: Stage
